title: dryopteris obliquata
intro: Dryopteris obliquata, also known as the Autumn fern, is a species of fern in the Dryopteridaceae family. It is native to Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Dryopteris obliquata include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
